entry.title: STM32 SPI 通信配置记录
我的 CET6 词汇学习 App
entry.content:
简介这是一款基于 AI 的 CET6 词汇学习应用，通过改写来自 Global News 的真实文章，将其转化为使用 CET6 词汇的版本，帮助学习者在真实语境中掌握六级核心词汇。 🔗 在线体验: https://hankhills.vercel.app 核心功能1. 文章来源从 Global News 获取最新的真实新闻文章，确保学习内容的时效性和真实性。 2. AI 智能改写利用 AI 技术将原文改写为 CET6 词汇版本：
保留原文核心意思 替换为六级考纲词汇 保持语句通顺自然
3. 对比学习同时展示原文和改写后的版本，方便对比学习：
理解词汇替换的语境 掌握高级词汇的使用场景
技术栈 前端: 部署在 Vercel AI: 智能文本改写 数据源: Global News API
使用建议 先阅读原文，理解大意 对比改写版本，标记不熟悉的 CET6 词汇 尝试用自己的话复述文章 定期复习学过的词汇
总结通过真实新闻文章学习 CET6 词汇，不仅能提高词汇量，还能了解时事，一举两得。欢迎体验！
项目地址: https://hankhills.vercel.app

entry.title: Hexo 主题 Markdown 全面渲染测试
English day 1
entry.content:
This post records my first day of CET-6 vocabulary learning. I chose a small group of useful words and tried to understand their meanings, usage and some memory tips. IntroductionToday’s focus is new CET-6 words. For each word I note:
a simple definition my own understanding at least one example sentence
Core words1. impartialAn impartial person or decision is fair and not influenced by personal feelings or interests. We need an impartial government to make just and reasonable laws for everyone. 2. empiricalEmpirical ideas or conclusions are based on experience, observation or experiments, rather than only on theory. Good scientists rely on empirical evidence instead of personal assumptions. 3. plausibleSomething plausible seems reasonable or likely to be true, but it may still be false. Despite his plausible excuse, the teacher still didn’t believe him. 4. mitigateTo mitigate something is to make it less serious, harmful or painful. The new policy is designed to mitigate the effects of the economic crisis. 5. subsidyA subsidy is money given by a government, company or organization to support a person, business or activity. The company offers a housing subsidy to help employees pay their rent. 6. distortTo distort something is to change it so that it is no longer true, clear or accurate. Newspapers are often accused of distorting the truth. 7. conformTo conform means to obey rules, standards or laws, or to behave in the same way as most other people. The kitchen does not conform to hygiene regulations. The changes were introduced to conform with international classifications. 8. hygieneHygiene is the practice of keeping yourself and your surroundings clean in order to maintain health and prevent disease. Good personal hygiene, such as washing your hands regularly, can reduce the risk of infection. 9. complimentA compliment is a polite expression of praise or admiration. He paid me a compliment on my presentation. Note: this is different from “complement”, which means to make something complete or go well together. 10. contendTo contend that something is true is to argue or claim strongly that it is true. People once contended that the earth was flat, but as people travelled farther, the idea that the earth is round finally won. 11. indifferentIf you are indifferent to something, you have no strong interest, feeling or opinion about it. She was surprisingly indifferent to the result of the exam. 12. compactA compact object is smaller than usual or takes up little space compared with similar things. I prefer driving a compact car because it is easier to park in the city. Closing thoughtsWriting down these words with my own explanations and examples helps me remember them more deeply than just reading a word list. In the next few days, I will keep reviewing today’s vocabulary and add more CET-6 words, so that my active vocabulary grows step by step.

entry.title: Opencode Antigravity Auth 插件：通过 Google OAuth 解锁 Antigravity 配额
entry.content:
Opencode Antigravity Auth 插件：通过 Google OAuth 解锁 Antigravity 配额在现代 AI 辅助开发中，获取稳定且高质量的模型访问至关重要。今天我要介绍一个实用的 Opencode 插件——opencode-antigravity-auth，它能让你通过 Google OAuth 认证来访问 Antigravity（Google 的 IDE）的配额，从而使用 Claude Opus 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro 等高级模型。 主要功能这个插件提供了以下核心特性：
多模型支持 - 通过 Google OAuth 访问 Claude Opus 4.6、Sonnet 4.6 和 Gemini 3.1 Pro/Flash 多账户管理 - 支持添加多个 Google 账户，配额耗尽时自动轮换 双配额系统 - 同时访问 Antigravity 和 Gemini CLI 的配额 思维模型支持 - 支持 Claude 和 Gemini 3 的扩展思维功能，可配置思维预算 Google 搜索接地 - 为 Gemini 模型启用网络搜索功能 自动恢复 - 自动处理会话错误和工具故障 插件兼容性 - 可与其他 OpenCode 插件（oh-my-opencode、dcp 等）配合使用
安装步骤方式一：自动安装（推荐）将以下命令粘贴到任何 LLM 代理（Claude Code、OpenCode、Cursor 等）中： Install the opencode-antigravity-auth plugin and add the Antigravity model definitions to ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json by following: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NoeFabris/opencode-antigravity-auth/dev/README.md
方式二：手动安装 添加插件配置 在 ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json 中添加： { "plugin": ["opencode-antigravity-auth@latest"]}
登录 Google 账户 opencode auth login
配置模型 运行 opencode auth login → 选择 Google → OAuth with Google (Antigravity) → 选择 “Configure models in opencode.json”（自动配置所有模型）
开始使用 opencode run "Hello" --model=google/antigravity-claude-opus-4-6-thinking --variant=max
模型参考Antigravity 配额（Claude 和 Gemini 的默认路由）
模型 变体 说明
antigravity-gemini-3-pro low, high Gemini 3 Pro 支持思维
antigravity-gemini-3.1-pro low, high Gemini 3.1 Pro 支持思维（取决于部署情况）
antigravity-gemini-3-flash minimal, low, medium, high Gemini 3 Flash 支持思维
antigravity-claude-sonnet-4-6 — Claude Sonnet 4.6
antigravity-claude-opus-4-6-thinking low, max Claude Opus 4.6 支持扩展思维
Gemini CLI 配额（与 Antigravity 分开的配额池）
模型 说明
gemini-2.5-flash Gemini 2.5 Flash
gemini-2.5-pro Gemini 2.5 Pro
gemini-3-flash-preview Gemini 3 Flash（预览版）
gemini-3-pro-preview Gemini 3 Pro（预览版）
gemini-3.1-pro-preview Gemini 3.1 Pro（预览版）
完整配置示例将以下配置添加到 ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json： { "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json", "plugin": ["opencode-antigravity-auth@latest"], "provider": { "google": { "models": { "antigravity-gemini-3-pro": { "name": "Gemini 3 Pro (Antigravity)", "limit": { "context": 1048576, "output": 65535 }, "modalities": { "input": ["text", "image", "pdf"], "output": ["text"] }, "variants": { "low": { "thinkingLevel": "low" }, "high": { "thinkingLevel": "high" } } }, "antigravity-claude-opus-4-6-thinking": { "name": "Claude Opus 4.6 Thinking (Antigravity)", "limit": { "context": 200000, "output": 64000 }, "modalities": { "input": ["text", "image", "pdf"], "output": ["text"] }, "variants": { "low": { "thinkingConfig": { "thinkingBudget": 8192 } }, "max": { "thinkingConfig": { "thinkingBudget": 32768 } } } } // ... 其他模型配置 } } }}
多账户设置要获得更高的配额，可以添加多个 Google 账户： opencode auth login # 再次运行以添加更多账户
账户管理选项：
配置模型 - 在 opencode.json 中自动配置所有插件模型 检查配额 - 查看每个账户的剩余 API 配额 管理账户 - 启用/禁用用于轮换的特定账户
故障排除快速重置大多数问题可以通过删除账户文件并重新登录解决： rm ~/.config/opencode/antigravity-accounts.jsonopencode auth login
常见问题 403 权限拒绝 - 需要在 Google Cloud Console 中启用 Gemini for Google Cloud API 找不到 Gemini 模型 - 在 provider 配置中添加 "npm": "@ai-sdk/google" 400 错误 - 更新到最新测试版或禁用不兼容的 MCP 服务器 所有账户速率限制 - 更新插件或删除账户文件重新认证
重要警告⚠️ 使用风险提示 使用此插件可能违反 Google 的服务条款。一些用户报告了他们的 Google 账户被禁止或影子禁止（无明确通知的限制访问）。 使用此插件即表示你承认：
这是一个未经 Google 认可的非官方工具 你的账户可能被暂停或永久禁止 你需要承担使用此插件的所有风险
项目信息 GitHub 仓库：NoeFabris/opencode-antigravity-auth 许可证：MIT License 支持：如果此插件对你有帮助，可以考虑在 Ko-fi 上支持开发者
这个插件为 Opencode 用户提供了强大的模型访问能力，但使用时请务必了解相关风险。对于需要高质量 AI 辅助开发的开发者来说，这是一个值得尝试的工具。
